name: design-loop-methodology
description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents that critique any design surface through five conceptual lenses (design loop, intent, constraint cascade, hierarchy budget, lifecycle). Agents detect which lifecycle phase your design system is in (bootstrap / apply / audit / tweak / refactor) and compose the right skill chain — the same lens reads very differently per phase. Ships five canonical lens docs + 11 composable skills so the methodology travels with the plugin into any consumer project.
